name: CHARTIS_UI_V2
comment: Required: enables the editorial v5 chrome. Without it the app falls back to the legacy dark Bloomberg shell — DO NOT ship without this set.

name: RCM_MC_HOST
comment: Bind all interfaces so Azure App Service's HTTP front-end can reach the container. demo.py auto-detects WEBSITE_HOSTNAME and defaults to 0.0.0.0 even without this, but setting it explicitly is the supported path.

name: LOG_LEVEL
comment: Tune verbosity without a code deploy. Accepts DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL (case-insensitive) or numeric (10/20/30/40/50). Defaults to INFO if missing or unrecognized.

name: RCM_MC_CSRF_SECRET
value: <32+ random characters — generate with `python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(48))"`>
comment: Persistent HMAC secret for CSRF tokens — when set, partners stay logged in across container restarts and deploys. Must be at least 32 chars; shorter values trigger a stderr warning and the ephemeral fallback. SlotSetting=true so the secret stays bound to its slot during slot swaps. ROTATE this if compromise is suspected — every existing CSRF token will invalidate.

name: RCM_MC_DB_PATH
comment: Path to the portfolio SQLite file. /home is mounted as Azure persistent storage so the file survives container restarts. The /home/data subfolder must exist (one-time mkdir during App Service setup). Without this, demo.py falls back to tempfile.mkdtemp which gets wiped on every restart.

name: WEBSITES_PORT
comment: Port the App Service front-end forwards to inside the container. demo.py reads PORT then WEBSITES_PORT then 8765 default — set whichever the platform expects (Azure App Service for Containers prefers WEBSITES_PORT).

name: WEBSITES_ENABLE_APP_SERVICE_STORAGE
comment: Mount /home as persistent storage so portfolio.db survives container restarts. Required when RCM_MC_DB_PATH points under /home.
